site.name: Atoumbré Kouassi
site.headline: Cloud engineer and software systems builder

hero.intro: I design cloud infrastructure, observability platforms, and production-style software systems with AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Python, and OpenTelemetry.

proofPoints: 17+ years of experience across IT, networks, data, and software
Currently building Grafana Cloud onboarding automation at Kauris
Hands-on with AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Python, TypeScript, Dart, and Flutter
projectsIntro: Selected work across cloud infrastructure, observability, backend systems, and developer tooling.

projects.name: Cloud Resume Challenge
projects.summary: A production-style personal platform built with Terraform, AWS, Astro, serverless backend components, and GitHub Actions using OIDC.
projects.featuredNote: This portfolio site is built and deployed from this project.

projects.name: Weft Backend Services
projects.summary: A production-oriented backend services monorepo focused on workload decomposition, event-driven processing, and time-sensitive protocol operations.

projects.name: Weft Backend Resources
projects.summary: Terraform-managed AWS infrastructure for backend workloads, supporting a production-style environment with shared cloud resources, deployment primitives, and operational controls.

projects.name: Levit
projects.summary: A deterministic reactive architecture library for Dart and Flutter that explores application state, dependency flow, and developer ergonomics.

projects.name: Grafana Cloud Onboarding Automation
projects.summary: An onboarding solution for automating Grafana Cloud environment enrollment, folder hierarchies, and observability setup using Terraform and OpenTelemetry.

projects.name: Observability Stack
projects.summary: A local observability platform wiring Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, and OpenTelemetry collectors around a sample application to validate end-to-end telemetry flows.

about.body: My background spans service delivery, network systems, data engineering, and software development. That range gives me a practical engineering mindset: I care about reliability, automation, visibility, and systems that teams can actually operate.

whatIBuild.body: I build systems that need to be shipped, observed, and operated cleanly across infrastructure, software, and delivery workflows.
areas: Terraform-managed AWS infrastructure and deployment pipelines
Observability foundations with Grafana and OpenTelemetry
Backend services and developer tooling for maintainable systems

about.focus: Today I focus on cloud platforms and observability, building tooling and infrastructure that reduce onboarding time, standardize telemetry, and improve operational confidence.

experienceHighlights.summary: Building automation for Grafana Cloud onboarding and observability standardization with Terraform and OpenTelemetry.

Co-founded a decentralized lending protocol on Radix DLT. Designed two iterations of the protocol architecture in Scrypto, with emphasis on asset safety, transaction atomicity, and operational observability. The protocol reached roughly $3M peak TVL and remains live in production.
Used SQL, Athena, Python, and Power BI to improve reporting, governance, and operational decision support, contributing to measurable improvements in service opportunities and lead times.
Led service delivery for telecom operators across West and Central Africa, with responsibility for SLA performance, operational process improvement, and customer-facing delivery.

certifications.name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
certifications.issuer: Amazon Web Services Training and Certification
